home.title: You're in
home.signedInAs: Signed in as {email} — two-step verification complete.
home.nextUp: Next up: create a company or accept an invitation. That flow arrives with the next roadmap item.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your work account email and password.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: One account works across all your companies.
signup.confirmBody: We sent you a confirmation link. Open it to activate your account, then sign in.

enroll.title: Set up two-step verification
enroll.subtitle: Required before you can continue — it protects payslips, contracts and other sensitive data.
enroll.step1: Install an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password…).
enroll.step2: Scan the QR code with the app (or type the key below it).
enroll.step3: Enter the 6-digit code the app shows.
enroll.qrAlt: QR code to scan with your authenticator app
enroll.recoveryNote: If you lose your phone, your administrator or support can reset two-step verification after confirming your identity.

challenge.title: Two-step verification
challenge.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
challenge.lostDevice: Lost your phone? Contact your administrator or support to reset two-step verification.

errors.invalid_credentials: Wrong email or password. Check both and try again.
errors.user_already_exists: An account with this email already exists — sign in instead.
errors.weak_password: That password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters, mixing letters and numbers.
errors.over_request_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.mfa_verification_failed: That code didn't match. Check the app and enter the current code.
errors.validation_failed: Some fields are invalid. Check them and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Try again — if it persists, contact support.

design.title: Design tokens
design.description: Smoke test for the token pipeline — same semantic variables in light and dark.
